selling.title: Selling
selling.hint:
🛒 Browse or search your products to add them to the cart.
Tap a product to set the quantity and price, then tap the cart button to complete the sale.

scan.title: Scan
scan.comingHint: Will be available in the next release

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.hint:
💸 Record all your shop expenses here — rent, electricity, salaries, and more.
Tap + to add a new expense. Filter by Fixed or Variable to see spending patterns.
expenses.emptyHint:
Track rent, utilities, payroll and any other costs here.
Tap + to add one manually, or tap "Copy" below to instantly pull in your saved default expenses.
expenses.cloneDefaultsMsg: Copy default expenses to this month?

addSheet.title: Add expense
addSheet.hint1: Name helps identify the expense — e.g. May rent, Electricity bill.
addSheet.hint2: Pick a category to group expenses in your reports.
addSheet.hint3: The date determines which month's total and chart this entry appears in.
addSheet.deleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?

expenses.savedOffline: ⏳ Saved offline — will sync when connected

report.title: Report
report.hint:
📊 Your daily financial summary — revenue, expenses, and net profit at a glance.
Tap Today / This Week / This Month to change the period. Tap a bar in the chart for daily details.
report.emptyHint: Data will appear when you have orders or expenses

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.hint:
🔔 All alerts from your shop appear here — new orders, low stock, and system updates.
Tap a notification to jump to the related screen. Tap Mark all read to clear the badge.
notifications.markAllReadMsg: All notifications will be marked as read.
notifications.emptyHint: Order and system notifications will appear here

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.hint:
📦 See stock levels for every product in real time — filter by Low or Out of Stock to act fast.
Tap the pencil icon on any item to adjust its quantity and log the reason for the change.
inventory.emptyHint: Add products to track inventory here

combos.title: Combos
combos.hint:
🎁 Create combo deals that bundle multiple products together at a discounted price.
Tap + to build a new combo. Toggle active/hidden to control visibility at checkout.
combos.editHint:
🎁 Search for products and set the quantity for each item in this bundle.
Set the combo price below the retail total to show customers how much they save.
combos.emptyHint: Create product combos to speed up sales
combos.deleteMsg: This combo will be permanently deleted.

categories.title: Product categories
categories.hint:
📂 Categories help staff and customers find products quickly during checkout.
Tap + to add a category with an icon and name. Tap the pencil to rename or change its icon.
categories.emptyHint: Create categories to organize your products
categories.deleteHasProducts: Cannot delete a category with {{count}} products.

gold.title: Today's gold price
gold.hint:
💰 Today's gold buy and sell prices are used to automatically price jewelry products.
Tap the pencil icon to enter today's rates. The chart shows the 7-day price trend.
gold.noDataHint: Enter gold prices to track changes
gold.warnSellLtBuy: Sell price is lower than buy price

printTemplates.title: Print templates
printTemplates.hint:
🖨️ Print templates define what appears on your receipts — shop info, items, and totals.
Tap a template to preview and edit it. Tap the star to set it as the default for all receipts.
printTemplates.emptyHint: Create templates to customize your receipts

detail.previewHint: Save and test print from the POS screen to preview the template.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hint:
⚙️ Configure your shop, account, and app all in one place.
Update shop info, manage bank accounts, set up security, and control your notification preferences.
settings.logoutMsg: Are you sure you want to sign out?

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.hint:
🔒 Enter your current password, then choose a new one with at least 8 characters.
You will be signed out after changing — make sure to remember the new password.
changePassword.success: Password changed. Please sign in again.

shopInfo.title: Shop info
shopInfo.hint:
🏪 Your shop name, address, and phone are printed on every receipt customers receive.
Fill in or update any field below, then tap Save in the top right to apply your changes.

bankAccounts.title: Bank accounts
bankAccounts.hint:
🏦 Saved bank accounts are used to generate QR codes for bank transfer payments at checkout.
Tap + to add an account. Tap the star icon to set one as the default for QR payments.
bankAccounts.deleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this bank account?
bankAccounts.emptyHint: Add bank accounts to print on receipts and receive transfers

posConfig.title: POS configuration
posConfig.denominationsHint: Select denominations shown at cash checkout

defaultExpenses.title: Default expenses
defaultExpenses.screenHint:
💡 Default expenses are preset items that auto-fill when recording monthly costs.
Add recurring costs like rent, electricity, or salaries once — then apply them with one tap each month.
defaultExpenses.hint: Default expenses will be suggested when adding monthly expenses
defaultExpenses.emptyHint: Add fixed monthly costs like rent, utilities...
defaultExpenses.deleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this default expense?

notificationPreferences.title: Notification settings
notificationPreferences.hint:
🔔 Control exactly which events send you an in-app notification.
Toggle each type on or off — new orders, stock alerts, system updates. Changes save automatically.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.hint:
💌 Share a bug report, feature idea, or general comment directly with our team.
Select a category, describe your experience in detail, then tap Send — we read every message.
feedback.successMsg: Your feedback has been submitted. We'll review it as soon as possible.

feedbackHistory.title: Feedback history
feedbackHistory.hint:
💬 Track the status of feedback you've sent to our team.
Received → under review · Processing → being worked on · Resolved → completed.
feedbackHistory.emptyHint: Your submitted feedback will appear here

activityLog.title: Activity log
activityLog.hint:
📋 A timestamped record of every action in your shop — orders, product changes, and setting updates.
Use the filter chips to narrow by category. Helps you track what changed and when.

tnc.title: Terms & Conditions
tnc.loadError: Failed to load terms. Please try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.hint:
⚠️ Deleting your account permanently erases all shop data — products, orders, and customers.
Type the confirmation keyword exactly as shown below, then tap the delete button to proceed.
deleteAccount.warning1: All shop data and transaction history will be permanently deleted
deleteAccount.warning2: Account cannot be recovered after deletion
deleteAccount.warning3: All subscriptions and payments will be immediately cancelled
deleteAccount.confirmDialogMsg: This action cannot be undone. All data will be permanently deleted.

securitySettings.title: Security
securitySettings.hint:
🔐 Enable a 6-digit PIN for fast login without typing your password each time.
Once PIN is active, you can also turn on Face ID or fingerprint for even quicker access.
securitySettings.pinSubtitle: Set a 6-digit PIN to sign in quickly without your password
securitySettings.disablePinMsg: PIN and biometric login will be disabled. You'll need your password to sign in.
securitySettings.biometricSubtitle: Sign in quickly using your face or fingerprint
securitySettings.biometricNotAvailable: Biometrics not available on this device
securitySettings.biometricRequiresPin: Enable PIN first before using biometrics
securitySettings.infoNote: PIN and biometrics only protect the app lock screen. Your shop data is encrypted and secured by your account.

displaySettings.title: Display & Language
displaySettings.hint:
🎨 Switch between Light, Dark, or Auto theme to match your preference or time of day.
Change the app language between Vietnamese and English. Toggle Hide amounts for privacy.
displaySettings.privacyModeHint: Mask revenue and money values on screen

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.hint:
⭐ Shows your current subscription plan, expiry date, and all included features.
Contact support before your plan expires to avoid losing access to advanced features.
subscription.upgradeHint: Contact us to upgrade or renew

common.errorStateMsg: Unable to load data. Please try again.
common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.maintenance: System under maintenance. Please try again later.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Shop management
login.locked: Account locked. Please contact your manager.
login.networkError: Cannot connect. Check your network and try again.
login.subtitleOnboarding: Log in to complete your shop setup
login.unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

pinLogin.title: Enter PIN
pinLogin.lockedMsg: Too many wrong attempts. Please sign in with your password.
pinLogin.sessionExpiredMsg: Session expired. Please sign in again.
pinLogin.biometricError: Biometric failed. Please use your PIN.

pinSetup.title: Create PIN
pinSetup.subtitle: Set a 6-digit PIN for fast sign-in next time
pinSetup.confirmSubtitle: Enter your PIN again to confirm
pinSetup.mismatch: PINs don't match. Please try again.

forgotPin.title: Forgot PIN
forgotPin.subtitle: Enter your password to verify and set a new PIN

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Sign up for free, start today
register.tncText: I have read and agree to the
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
register.tncContent:
TAPPYPOS TERMS OF USE

1. By registering, you agree to use this application solely for legitimate shop management purposes.

2. We collect shop data to provide our services. Your data is secured and will not be shared with third parties without your consent.

3. You are responsible for keeping your account and PIN secure.

4. TappyPOS reserves the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.

5. Support contact: support@tappypos.vn or 0901 234 567.

pinLoginExt.lockAlertMsg: Too many wrong attempts. Try again in 30 minutes or sign in with password.
pinLoginExt.sessionExpiredMsg: Please enter your PIN or sign in again.
pinLoginExt.biometricExpiredMsg: Session expired. Please sign in again.

pinSetupExt.mismatchMsg: Incorrect PIN confirmation. Please try again.
pinSetupExt.errorMsg: Could not save your PIN. Please check your connection and try again.

shopId.subtitle: 💼 Smart management, hands-free selling
shopId.label: Shop ID (e.g. pho-a7k2)
shopId.notFound: No shop found with this ID. Please check or register.
shopId.networkError: Cannot connect. Check your network and try again.
shopId.pendingOnboarding: Registered but haven't set up your shop? Log in to continue

forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your registered phone number. We will contact you within 24 hours to help reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentDesc: We will contact you within 24 hours to help you reset your password.
forgotPassword.networkError: Cannot connect. Check your network and try again.

forgotPinExt.subtitle: Verify your password to set a new PIN
forgotPinExt.mismatchMsg: Incorrect PIN confirmation. Please try again.
forgotPinExt.networkErrorMsg: Cannot connect. Check your network and try again.

forgotShopId.title: Forgot shop ID
forgotShopId.subtitle: Enter your shop name and the phone number you used when registering. We will look it up and send your shop ID within 24 hours.
forgotShopId.sentDesc: We will contact you within 24 hours to provide your shop ID.

auth.deviceSwitched: Account signed in on another device
auth.logoutConfirm: Do you want to sign out?

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Revenue overview
dashboard.subscriptionExpired: Subscription expired — contact support to renew
dashboard.subscriptionExpiringSoon: Subscription expires on {{date}} — renew to keep access

quickOrder.configHint: Select up to 5 products to show in the quick order strip.
quickOrder.errorMsg: Could not create order. Try again?

pos.title: Point of Sale
pos.emptyCartHint: Search and add products to start
pos.checkoutError: Could not complete order. Please try again.
pos.savedOffline: Saved offline — will sync when connected
pos.willSyncWhenOnline: Will be sent automatically when back online
pos.soldOutPrompt: Mark this item as sold out?
pos.soldOutCurrently: This item is currently sold out.
pos.soldOutMorningMsg: {{count}} item(s) were marked sold out yesterday. Restore all?

orders.title: Orders
orders.hint:
🧾 Every sale made in your shop appears here — tap an order to view details or print a receipt.
Filter by status or search by order number and customer name to find any order quickly.
orders.cancelConfirmMsg: This order will be cancelled. This cannot be undone.

products.title: Products
products.hint:
📋 Full details for this product — price, stock level, and description.
Tap the pencil icon to edit any field. Tap Add to Cart to start an order immediately.
For services, duration shows how long the appointment takes.
products.name: Name
products.addHint: ✏️ Fill in product details. Choose the type first — it determines which fields are shown.
products.editHint: ✏️ Update the fields below and tap Save. The product type cannot be changed after creation.

more.title: More
more.hint:
📱 Advanced tools for managing your shop — inventory, combos, gold prices, print templates, and more.
Tap any tile to open a management screen. Use these tools to keep your shop running smoothly.

appt.title: Appointments
appt.emptyHint: Tap + to schedule a new appointment
appt.checkInSuccess: Customer checked in. Proceeding to service order.

marketGold.title: Gold Market Prices
marketGold.noDataHint: Try a different source or tap refresh

interestCalc.title: Interest Calculator
interestCalc.hint: Enter the principal, annual rate, and term in months. Simple interest: on fixed principal only. Compound interest: interest earns further interest.
interestCalc.disclaimer: Results are for reference only. Actual bank rates may change. This is not investment advice.

loanCalc.title: Loan Calculator
loanCalc.hint: Enter the loan amount, annual rate, and term. Reducing Balance: fixed principal, decreasing interest. Fixed EMI: same total payment every month.
loanCalc.disclaimer: Results are estimates only. Does not include processing fees or insurance. Consult your bank for exact figures.
loanCalc.affordabilityWarning: Payment is {{pct}}% of income — exceeds recommended 30%

taxCalc.title: Income Tax (TNCN)
taxCalc.hint: Enter gross income before tax and social insurance. 2026 defaults: personal deduction 15.5M, dependent 6.2M each.
taxCalc.disclaimer: Results are for reference only. Actual figures may differ. Consult your tax authority for exact figures.
taxCalc.noTax: No tax — taxable income is zero or negative
taxCalc.customizeSubtitle: Edit insurance rates, salary cap and deductions

budgetRule.title: Budget Rule
budgetRule.hint: The 50/30/20 rule splits take-home pay into needs, wants, and savings. The 6 Jars method divides income into six purpose-driven buckets.
budgetRule.jar_playDesc: Fun money — spend it all guilt-free
budgetRule.disclaimer: These ratios are guidelines. Adjust percentages to fit your life situation.

breakeven.title: Break-even Calculator
breakeven.hint: Compare two options with different upfront costs and monthly expenses. The break-even point is when the cheaper monthly option offsets the higher upfront cost.
breakeven.breakevenNote: After this point {{a}} and {{b}} have cost the same total
breakeven.noBreakeven: No break-even — one option is always cheaper
breakeven.verdict_equal: Both options cost the same over 10 years
breakeven.disclaimer: Ignores inflation and changing rates. Use as a rough guide only.

profile.title: Account
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
profile.logoutConfirm: Do you want to sign out?

customers.title: Customers
customers.hint:
👥 Save customer details so you can look them up at checkout and track their loyalty points.
Tap + to add a new customer, or search by name or phone. Tap a customer to see their profile.
customers.formHint:
✏️ Name and phone number are required — other fields are optional but improve loyalty tracking.
A saved phone number lets you find this customer instantly during future checkouts.
customers.detailHint:
👤 Full profile for this customer — contact info, loyalty points balance, and recent purchase history.
Tap Edit at the top to update their details, or scroll down to view all past orders.
customers.noCustomersHint: Tap + to add a new customer
customers.name: Full name
customers.phoneTooShort: Phone number must be at least 10 digits
customers.phoneConflictMsg: This phone number belongs to customer "{{name}}". Do you want to continue?

loyalty.title: Loyalty Points
loyalty.topTier: Top tier — you've reached the highest level!
loyalty.adjustHint: Enter a positive number to add points, negative to deduct (e.g. +100 or -50)
loyalty.adjustReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Compensate error, bonus for service...

step1.title: Basic Information
step1.subtitle: 🏪 Help us personalise the experience for you and your customers.
step1.hint1: Your nickname is how TappyPOS greets you every day
step1.hint2: Shop name appears on every receipt and report
step1.hint3: Full name and address are optional — add them later if needed
step1.nicknamePlaceholder: What you'd like to be called (e.g. Hoa, Minh)

step2.title: Products
step2.subtitle: 📦 Select the products you sell to quickly build your catalog. You can edit or add more later.
step2.hint1: Tap a suggestion or type your own product name
step2.hint2: Set a price and unit — or leave blank to fill in later
step2.hint3: Everything can be edited after your shop is created
step2.cardDesc: After creating your shop, go to Products to add categories and products in full detail.
step2.featureListTitle: After creating your shop you can:
step2.feature1: Add products with photos and description
step2.feature3: Scan barcodes to find products quickly

step3.title: Monthly Expenses
step3.subtitle: 💸 Select your common expenses. You can edit them later.
step3.hint1: Tap a suggestion or type to search for an expense
step3.hint2: Enter the estimated monthly amount for each expense
step3.hint3: Helps TappyPOS compare your income and costs each month

step4.title: Review
step4.subtitle: Check your information before creating the shop. You can edit later.
step4.hint1: Check all your information before going live
step4.hint2: Tap Edit on any section to go back and change it
step4.hint3: Everything can still be updated after your shop is created
step4.networkError: Cannot connect. Check your network and try again.

shopType.title: Shop Type
shopType.subtitle: 🎯 Choose the type that best fits your business so TappyPOS can suggest the right products and settings.

CONVENIENCE_STORE.name: Convenience Store
CONVENIENCE_STORE.examples: Mini-mart, grocery, daily goods, general retail
CONVENIENCE_STORE.hint: Great for grocery stores, mini-marts, and general retail. TappyPOS suggests food, beverage, and everyday consumer product categories.

FOOD_BEVERAGE.name: Food & Beverage
FOOD_BEVERAGE.examples: Fresh food, packaged drinks, fruit stall, snacks
FOOD_BEVERAGE.hint: For fresh and packaged food and drink shops. Includes expiry date tracking and effective inventory management.

RESTAURANT.name: Restaurant
RESTAURANT.examples: Pho shop, rice shop, noodle house, local eatery
RESTAURANT.hint: Ideal for eateries and restaurants. Supports order-taking with table notes, shift-based revenue tracking and daily reporting.

COFFEE_SHOP.name: Coffee Shop
COFFEE_SHOP.examples: Café, bubble tea, juice bar, smoothie shop
COFFEE_SHOP.hint: For cafes, bubble tea, and juice shops. Fast checkout, flexible menus, and loyalty point tracking for regulars.

FASHION.name: Fashion
FASHION.examples: Clothing, shoes, accessories, bags, fashion retail
FASHION.hint: For clothing, accessories, and footwear shops. Manage sizes, colours, and inventory per product variant.

ELECTRONICS.name: Electronics
ELECTRONICS.examples: Phone shop, laptop, electronics, home appliances
ELECTRONICS.hint: For electronics and appliance stores. Tracks warranties, serial numbers, and lets staff search by specification.

BARBER_SHOP.name: Salon / Barbershop
BARBER_SHOP.examples: Men's barber, hair salon, perm, hair colouring, wash
BARBER_SHOP.hint: For hair salons and barbershops. Stores each customer's style preferences and visit history for personalised service.

NAIL_SHOP.name: Nail Studio
NAIL_SHOP.examples: Nail polish, gel, acrylic, nail art, manicure, pedicure
NAIL_SHOP.hint: For nail studios and manicure shops. Tracks each customer's preferred nail style and service history.

SPA_SHOP.name: Spa / Beauty Center
SPA_SHOP.examples: Massage, facial, waxing, hair removal, body treatment
SPA_SHOP.hint: For spas and beauty centers. Manages treatment courses, skin type records, and customer therapy history.

PHARMACY.name: Pharmacy
PHARMACY.hint: For pharmacies and small clinics. Manages drugs by registration number, expiry date, and prescription requirements.

JEWELRY.name: Jewelry / Gold
JEWELRY.hint: For gold and jewellery shops. Auto-prices items based on live market gold rates with weight and material tracking.

PAWN_SHOP.name: Pawn Shop
PAWN_SHOP.examples: Pawn shop, collateral lending, asset loans
PAWN_SHOP.hint: For pawn and collateral lending businesses. Creates pawn contracts, calculates interest automatically, and alerts on due dates.

OTHER.name: Other
OTHER.examples: Service business, any type not listed above
OTHER.hint: Your business type isn't listed here. You can still configure products, categories, and expenses after your shop is created.

PHO_SHOP.name: Pho Shop
PHO_SHOP.examples: Beef pho, chicken pho, pho restaurant

RICE_SHOP.name: Rice Shop
RICE_SHOP.examples: Rice plates, com tam, daily rice meals

NOODLE_SHOP.name: Noodle Shop
NOODLE_SHOP.examples: Noodle soup, stir-fried noodles, hu tieu, bun rieu

BUN_BO.name: Bun Bo Shop
BUN_BO.examples: Bun bo Hue, spicy beef noodle soup

HOT_POT.name: Hot Pot Restaurant
HOT_POT.examples: Thai hot pot, seafood hot pot, mushroom hot pot

LAU_BO.name: Lẩu bò
LAU_BO.examples: Beef hot pot, beef dipped in vinegar, grilled beef

QUAN_DE.name: Quán Dê
QUAN_DE.examples: Stir-fried goat, grilled goat, herbal goat stew

BANH_MI.name: Banh Mi Shop
BANH_MI.examples: Banh mi, Vietnamese sandwich, pate, cold cuts

EATERY.name: Street Food / Snacks
EATERY.examples: Street food, xoi, banh cuon, nem, spring rolls

CAFE.name: Coffee Shop
CAFE.examples: Drip coffee, milk coffee, iced coffee

BUBBLE_TEA.name: Bubble Tea Shop
BUBBLE_TEA.examples: Bubble tea, milk tea, fruit tea, topping

NAIL_STUDIO.name: Nail Studio
NAIL_STUDIO.examples: Manicure, pedicure, nail art, acrylic, gel

LASH_PMU.name: Lash & PMU Studio
LASH_PMU.examples: Eyelash extensions, eyebrow tattoo, lip tattoo, eyeliner

MASSAGE.name: Massage Shop
MASSAGE.examples: Relaxation massage, therapeutic massage, foot massage

BEAUTY_CLINIC.name: Beauty Clinic
BEAUTY_CLINIC.examples: Facial, acne treatment, laser, HIFU, hair removal

MAKEUP_STUDIO.name: Makeup & Bridal Studio
MAKEUP_STUDIO.examples: Event makeup, bridal makeup, photo shoot makeup

TRAD_MEDICINE.name: Traditional Medicine
TRAD_MEDICINE.examples: Herbal medicine, Chinese medicine, medicinal herbs

PAWN.name: Pawn Shop
PAWN.examples: Pawn, collateral loans, buy & sell used goods

CAR_WASH.name: Car Wash
CAR_WASH.examples: Motorbike wash, car wash, auto detailing

LAUNDRY.name: Laundry Service
LAUNDRY.examples: Wash & dry, dry cleaning, laundry drop-off

FLOWER_SHOP.name: Flower Shop
FLOWER_SHOP.examples: Fresh flowers, artificial flowers, event flowers

OTHER.name: Other
OTHER.examples: Other business type not listed above

PUB.name: Pub / Beer House
PUB.hint: For pubs and beer houses serving drinks and bar snacks. Supports table management and order tracking.

PUB_SEAFOOD.name: Seafood Pub
PUB_SEAFOOD.examples: Fresh seafood, seafood hotpot, live shrimp & crab
PUB_SEAFOOD.hint: For seafood-focused pubs. Supports table management, rich seafood menu, and advance reservations.

PUB_GOAT.name: Goat Meat Pub
PUB_GOAT.examples: Stir-fried goat, grilled goat, goat hotpot
PUB_GOAT.hint: For pubs specialising in goat meat dishes. Supports table management and per-portion or per-kg pricing.

PUB_BEEF.name: Beef Pub
PUB_BEEF.examples: Beef shabu, grilled beef, beef hotpot
PUB_BEEF.hint: For pubs specialising in beef dishes. Supports table management and flexible pricing.

tableSetup.title: Table Setup
tableSetup.hint1: Table setup helps you track available and occupied tables
tableSetup.hint2: You can add, edit, or remove tables after registration
tableSetup.hint3: Skip if your shop does not serve by table
tableSetup.autoGenHint: Creates Table 1 through Table N automatically

myWork.title: My Work
myWork.hint:
📋 My Queue shows tasks assigned to you. Pick Up shows tasks you can claim from the pool.
Tap a task card to start or complete it. Tap the history icon to see your completed work.
myWork.alreadyClaimed: This task was already taken by someone else
myWork.cannotUnpick: Cannot return a task that is already in progress

currencyConverter.title: Currency Exchange
currencyConverter.hint: Rates are fetched from Vietcombank every 30 minutes. Select a currency, enter an amount and choose the conversion direction.
currencyConverter.disclaimer: Rates are indicative only. Actual bank rates may differ.

perf.title: Staff Performance
perf.emptyHint: Data appears when technicians complete services in the selected period

queue.title: Staff Queue
queue.hint: Monitor every technician's work status in real time.
queue.emptyHint: The queue appears when new service orders are created
queue.concurrentHint: Customer being served by multiple technicians at once

staff.title: Staff
staff.hint: Manage staff accounts — add new members, assign roles and track account status.
staff.tempPasswordHint: Note this password before saving — staff will need to change it on first login.
staff.credentialHint: Note down the credentials and share with the staff member. The password will not be shown again.
staff.resetPasswordMsg: A new temporary password will be generated. Staff must change it on next login.
staff.deactivateConfirmMsg: This staff member will not be able to log in. You can reactivate later.
staff.activateConfirmMsg: This staff member will be able to log in again.
staff.noStaffHint: Add staff so they can log in and use the app.
staff.errorUsernameRequired: Please enter a phone number or username

barber.title: New Order
barber.hint:
💇 Tap a service to create an order and send it to the work queue — assign a staff member and add a note before confirming.
For retail products, set the quantity then confirm to complete the sale directly.
barber.orderCreatedHint: Order has been added to the queue
barber.noBankAccountHint: Go to Settings → Bank Accounts to add one
